trans-unit.source: Create, publish and evaluate your students' performance instantly
Generate quizzes from your classes using artificial intelligence
Create and publish quizzes ready for your classes
Evaluate and analyze your students' performance

trans-unit.source: Enter a duration between 1 and 300 minutes.

Exam step config shuffle enable label

Exam step config available until error

trans-unit.source: The end date must be after the start date.
trans-unit.note: Exam step config date range error
Exam step info title required error

trans-unit.source: Title must be at least 3 characters.
trans-unit.note: Exam step info title minlength error

trans-unit.source: Ex: DDD concepts and hexagonal architecture...

trans-unit.note: Exam step info select classes label

trans-unit.source: Please select at least one class.

Exam step questions selected count label
Exam step questions max score label

trans-unit.source: No questions available for the selected classes.

Back to dashboard button aria label
File drop zone tap to select

trans-unit.source: Students will be able to take auto-generated quizzes from this class content
At the end of the review the student sees what they got right
Questions are shuffled in each review
